objective: Clean up stale-open issue #475 after remote Overlord Sweep proof completed the remaining acceptance condition.
scope_boundary: Governance closeout and mirror cleanup only.
Move #475 out of active backlog/progress mirrors.
Amend the existing #475 closeout residual-risk section with remote proof.
Record validation evidence for the remote Overlord Sweep proof.
out_of_scope: Changing self-learning code, sweep workflow behavior, or model-routing policy.
Regenerating metrics, graphify outputs, wiki pages, or operator-context payloads.
research_summary: Issue #475 remained open after PR #477 because remote proof was pending. PR #477 merged at c3291dad, follow-up issue #481 closed via PR #483 at 181006e, and Overlord Sweep run 24741910552 succeeded with log evidence that scripts/orchestrator/self_learning.py report wrote metrics/self-learning/latest.json and latest.md.

sprints.name: Remote proof cleanup
sprints.goal: Make governance mirrors and closeout evidence match the completed #475 state.
tasks: Update OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md and docs/PROGRESS.md active/done rows.
Add validation evidence for issue #475 remote sweep proof.
Run local governance validation, publish PR, merge when green, and close #475.
acceptance_criteria: #475 is no longer listed as active in governance mirrors.
The closeout residual-risk section says no residual risk remains for #475.
Validation evidence links the successful remote sweep proof.
No code or downstream repository files change.

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify #475 remote proof exists before mirror cleanup.
specialist_reviews.summary: Confirmed PR #477 merged, issue #481 closed via PR #483, and Overlord Sweep run 24741910552 executed the self-learning report command and wrote the expected metrics artifacts.

alternate_model_review.summary: This cleanup changes only governance mirrors and closeout evidence after previously merged implementation proof.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #475 cleanup may update governance mirrors, closeout residual-risk text, plan/scope, and validation evidence only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run validation, publish the PR, merge when green, close #475, and delete stale branch.

material_deviation_rules: If remote sweep proof is not reproducible in GitHub logs, leave #475 open and record the blocker.
If code changes are needed, create a new issue rather than expanding this cleanup.
If downstream repo edits appear necessary, stop and create a downstream issue.
